target: Emily AI Teacher - Personal AI English Teacher with GPT-4o
summary: All Emily AI Teacher features working correctly. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed - Chat API, Multi-turn conversations, Sessions, History, TTS, New Session endpoints all functional. Frontend: Full page chat loads correctly with welcome screen, avatar, intro text, 3 quick prompts. Chat sends messages and receives AI responses (GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key). History dropdown shows sessions and New Conversation option. Floating button appears on other pages (dashboard, question-bank) and correctly hides on /emily page. TTS speaker button present on messages.

features_tested.notes: Returns {success: true, session_id, response} - GPT-4o responds with helpful content
Second message with same session_id remembers context from first message
Returns list of previous sessions with preview text
Returns messages array with role and content for each message
Returns {audio: base64, format: mp3} - OpenAI TTS with nova voice
Shows Emily avatar, 'Hi, I'm Emily!' heading, intro text, and 3 quick prompt buttons

features_tested.test_method: Playwright - clicked quick prompt, verified response
features_tested.notes: Clicking 'Give me a grammar quiz' sends message, typing indicator shows, Emily responds with quiz
Button appears in bottom-right corner, navigates to /emily, correctly hidden on /emily page
Shows 'New Conversation' option and list of previous sessions with previews

seed_data_creation: Created multiple Emily chat sessions during testing - stored in MongoDB emily_sessions collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Emily AI Teacher feature fully implemented and tested. Uses GPT-4o via emergentintegrations library with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. TTS uses OpenAI TTS with nova voice. Chat messages stored in MongoDB emily_sessions collection. EmilyFloatingButton conditionally renders on all pages except /emily (controlled in App.js line 450). All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing.
